description: Really easy to implement and get started. When we ran into road blocks Cue was great and trouble shooting and solving the issues.
author: Richard B.
pros: They are extremely customer centric which is hard to find these days. We see cue as a partner to success.
cons: Nothing really, it was very simple but when there were issues both companies helped solve the issues.

review_title: Moved from WhatsApp service provider to Cue
description: Cue is an innovative South African based company that understand the retail environment. Their WhatsApp environment brings excitement to the customer journey Their turnaround time is above the standard.
author: Loreine H.
pros: Professionalism Constant communication and progress updates Understanding of the SA retail environment
cons: There are really no least likes that can be mentioned

author: Adam C.
pros: Ease of use. Troubleshooting and issues are dealt with efficiently.
cons: Features are still being implemented, so some functionality is missing, but credit to Cue, these are being addressed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We use Cue for sales and support
description: CUE has been an invaluable asset to our team. Their swift response to client inquiries is truly commendable, saving us precious time in engaging potential leads. What stands out is their adeptness in vetting clients, ensuring our sales team invests efforts where it matters most—focusing on genuinely interested prospects. CUE's efficiency in filtering out non-qualifying clients has significantly enhanced our productivity and effectiveness. Highly recommended for their dedication to streamlining the sales process!
author: Ryan E.
pros: Easy to use. The team offer amazing customer service
cons: None so far for us if I am honest. The solution has worked well

description: It’s a partnership that has significantly helped our business.
author: Adam K.
pros: Their product offering is great but their customer service and customisation abilities are what I really like.
cons: The pricing is linked to global currency

review_title: Cue solutions in the insurtech market
author: Gustavo B.
pros: Staff commitment and good understanding of the final goal.
cons: Communication on their internal updates and patches could be better but wouldnt consider a "cons".

review_title: Fantastic Tool to engage with Customers
description: Great service and understanding of the applications of WhatsApp within our business
author: Liz R.
pros: Great team at Cue to work with ... especially [sensitive content hidden]
cons: None that I've seen - it only has positives to offer the business

author: Wendy M.
pros: Efficient for a business like ours. We can easily chat with our customers.
